AI WORKSPACE / OPERATIONAL CO-PILOT LAYER

Context first. Review always.

Manual AI context exports, imported suggestions, review queues, memory scaffolding, and cross-module observations. No autonomous agents, no direct LLM calls, no hidden automation.

OPERATING PRINCIPLE

AI prepares judgment. Por approves action.

Every AI result is a context row, review row, memory row, or ActionRequest. Nothing writes directly.

—

GOOGLE SHEET BRIDGE

Bridge Settings

Configure manual Google Sheet connection. No autosync. No silent overwrite.

CONNECTION

Sheet Connection
Not configured
Reset
Sheet URL / ID
Apps Script Endpoint
Sync Mode
Manual
Read-only
Test Connection
Not configured
NOT CONFIGURED

ENVIRONMENT

Apps Script Endpoint Setup
ACTIVE: NONE
No Env Var

The bridge connects to a Google Sheet via an Apps Script Web App endpoint. Priority: Manual entry (highest) → Environment variable → Not configured. You can configure the endpoint URL in two ways:

1. Environment Variable

Set VITE_APPS_SCRIPT_KARUN_ENDPOINT in .env.local or Vercel Environment Variables.

2. Manual Entry

Paste any HTTPS endpoint URL into the field above. Stored in browser localStorage only. Not committed.

⚠ Never commit private endpoint URLs to git.

Use .env.local (gitignored) or enter manually in this UI.

Expected Response Shape

Defined Tabs
